products.name: ABC tells the government to get out of its newsrooms
products.summary: ABC is firing back at the Federal Communications Commission after the agency opened an investigation into The View's airtime of political candidates. In a letter to the FCC on Tuesday, ABC argues that the agency's actions pose a risk to editorial independence

products.name: Google announces Pixel 11 launch event in August

products.name: Doom developer id reportedly cut in half as part of Xbox layoffs
